title: WHCD Shooting: Cole Allen storms checkpoint targeting Trump officials
snippet: Cole Tomas Allen, 31, California teacher/engineer, armed with shotgun/handgun/knives, stormed WHCD security checkpoint Saturday night. Called himself 'friendly federal assassin'. Targeted Trump admin officials. Trump rushed out by Secret Service. Federal charges: assault of federal officer + firearm crime.
tag_reason: Entirely new domestic security event directly involving the war president
